description.p: Tur is a modern, native download manager built on a high-performance Rust core (tur-rs). It supports multiple download engines including its own adaptive range-stealing engine and external engines like aria2c, with yt-dlp integration for media downloads.

ul.li: Multi-engine support: native tur-rs, aria2c, yt-dlp
Persistent download queue with SQLite (UUID v7 IDs)
Parallel segmented downloading for maximum speed
Clean, modern UI with per-download instance view

description.p: Initial Flathub release. Multi-engine architecture with tur-rs, aria2c, and yt-dlp support. SQLite persistence with UUID v7 IDs.
